TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tayal qalang hogal squnun kuwara squliq na tayal Taywan ga kbhul hi ga sazing pasento balay. kya hmzinas smka na' qu cyux maki qalang rgyax, kya obeh smka squliq tayal cyux mshzi maki qalang hogal la. cingay qu pcyuwagan qalang hogal hya, smrawiy hmuluy khmay mrkyas. kruma ga cyux si trhuw maki qalang hogal, mtzyuwaw, magal bes, ru qmayat kinbahan. nanu yasa qu cingay balay kinbahan tayal cyux mrkyas mqyanux qalang hogal la.
S.PHON: tajal qalaŋ ħoɣal s~ɕqunun kuwara s~ɕquliq na tajal tajwan ɣa kβħul ħi ɣa s~ɕaziŋ pas~ɕento βalaj. kja ħmzinas~ɕ s~ɕmka naʔ qu ʦ~ʨjux maki qalaŋ rɣjax, kja oβeħ s~ɕmka s~ɕquliq tajal ʦ~ʨjux ms~ɕħzi maki qalaŋ ħoɣal la. ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu pʦ~ʨjuwaɣan qalaŋ ħoɣal ħja, s~ɕmrawij ħmuluj kħmaj mrkjas~ɕ. kruma ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕi trħuw maki qalaŋ ħoɣal, mtzjuwaw, maɣal βes~ɕ, ru qmajat kinβaħan. nanu jas~ɕa qu ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj kinβaħan tajal ʦ~ʨjux mrkjas~ɕ mqjanux qalaŋ ħoɣal la.
S.FORM: Tayal qalang hogal squnun kuwara squliq na tayal Taywan ga kbhul hi ga sazing pasento balay. kya hmzinas smka na' qu cyux maki qalang rgyax, kya obeh smka squliq tayal cyux mshzi maki qalang hogal la. cingay qu pcyuwagan qalang hogal hya, smrawiy hmuluy khmay mrkyas. kruma ga cyux si trhuw maki qalang hogal, mtzyuwaw, magal bes, ru qmayat kinbahan. nanu yasa qu cingay balay kinbahan tayal cyux mrkyas mqyanux qalang hogal la.
S.PHON: tajal qalaŋ ħoɣal s~ɕqunun kuwara s~ɕquliq na tajal tajwan ɣa kβħul ħi ɣa s~ɕaziŋ pas~ɕento βalaj. kja ħmzinas~ɕ s~ɕmka naʔ qu ʦ~ʨjux maki qalaŋ rɣjax, kja oβeħ s~ɕmka s~ɕquliq tajal ʦ~ʨjux ms~ɕħzi maki qalaŋ ħoɣal la. ʦ~ʨiŋaj qu pʦ~ʨjuwaɣan qalaŋ ħoɣal ħja, s~ɕmrawij ħmuluj kħmaj mrkjas~ɕ. kruma ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕi trħuw maki qalaŋ ħoɣal, mtzjuwaw, maɣal βes~ɕ, ru qmajat kinβaħan. nanu jas~ɕa qu ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj kinβaħan tajal ʦ~ʨjux mrkjas~ɕ mqjanux qalaŋ ħoɣal la.
